svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 40px; margin-left: 850px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 18px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ededed); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 冪等性キーのライフサイクル (クライアント送信 → tier1 受信 → Valkey 重複チェック → 応答分岐)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 478px; height: 1px; padding-top: 125px; margin-left: 611px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ededed); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
tier2 / tier3 クライアント
UUIDv7 生成 + X-Idempotency-Key 付与
SDK: k1s0.StateClient.Set(..., WithIdempotencyKey(uuid.NewV7()))

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 558px; height: 1px; padding-top: 250px; margin-left: 571px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ededed); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
tier1 公開 API (Dapr ファサード / Go)
X-Idempotency-Key ヘッダ抽出 + スコープ判定 (tenant default)
未指定時は 400 Bad Request (IDEMPOTENCY_REQUIRED)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 558px; height: 1px; padding-top: 390px; margin-left: 571px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;

div.div:
NX 成否で分岐
(Valkey 原子操作、10ms 以内)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(232, 245, 233), rgb(21, 33, 22)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(46, 125, 50), rgb(100, 168, 104));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 318px; height: 1px; padding-top: 685px; margin-left: 161px;

div.div:
NX 成功 (初回リクエスト)
キーを新規作成
業務処理を実行可

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 243, 224), rgb(36, 26, 9)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(239, 108, 0), rgb(222, 110, 17));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 318px; height: 1px; padding-top: 685px; margin-left: 1221px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;

div.div:
NX 失敗 (既存キー検出)
既存 status を読み出して分岐

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 358px; height: 1px; padding-top: 815px; margin-left: 141px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ededed); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
業務処理実行
(State.Set / PubSub.Publish / Workflow.Start 等)
処理後に Valkey を UPDATE
status:completed + response_body 保存

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(232, 245, 233), rgb(21, 33, 22)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(46, 125, 50), rgb(100, 168, 104));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 358px; height: 1px; padding-top: 945px; margin-left: 141px;

div.div:
200 OK + 処理結果応答
X-Idempotent-Replay: false

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.div:
request_hash 照合 (衝突対策)
SHA-256(body) が一致するか確認

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 358px; height: 1px; padding-top: 815px; margin-left: 691px;

div.div:
status 分岐
processing / completed / failed

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 243, 224), rgb(36, 26, 9)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(239, 108, 0), rgb(222, 110, 17));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 218px; height: 1px; padding-top: 950px; margin-left: 551px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ededed); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
409 Conflict
Retry-After: 5s
processing 状態
(5 分超過時は強制 failed 遷移)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(232, 245, 233), rgb(21, 33, 22)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(46, 125, 50), rgb(100, 168, 104));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 218px; height: 1px; padding-top: 950px; margin-left: 801px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ededed); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
前回応答をリプレイ
X-Idempotent-Replay: true
業務処理は再実行しない

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(253, 243, 243), rgb(33, 25, 25)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(198, 40, 40), rgb(255, 145, 145));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 218px; height: 1px; padding-top: 950px; margin-left: 1051px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ededed); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
前回失敗応答を返却
クライアントは新キーで再発行
またはリトライポリシー適用

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(253, 243, 243), rgb(33, 25, 25)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(198, 40, 40), rgb(255, 145, 145));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 950px; margin-left: 1321px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ededed); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
409 Conflict
IDEMPOTENCY_MISMATCH
(ボディ不一致、早期バグ検出)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 358px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1075px; margin-left: 141px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ededed); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Valkey 組込 TTL GC
24h 経過で自動 expire
別スイーププロセス不要

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 248, 230), rgb(30, 24, 9)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 320px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1053px; margin-left: 550px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ededed); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
オーバーヘッド / 数値仕様
Valkey SET NX EX: 10ms タイムアウト
冪等化オーバーヘッド: 1ms 未満 (p99)
tier1 API p99 予算 500ms のうち 0.2% 消費

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 248, 230), rgb(30, 24, 9)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 320px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1053px; margin-left: 920px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ededed); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
キーのスコープ
idempotency:tenant:{tenant}:{api}:{uuid} (default)
global / user スコープも指定可
マルチテナント衝突を構造的に排除

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 248, 230), rgb(30, 24, 9)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 320px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1053px; margin-left: 1290px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ededed); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
ハッシュ衝突対策
SHA-256(request body) を保存
同一キーで異なるボディ = クライアントバグ
IDEMPOTENCY_MISMATCH で即座に検出

div.div: ― 実線太: 明示呼び出し (HTTP / gRPC / Valkey コマンド)
